[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 011110110 6
1 100111001 5
2 010111111 7
3 001101001 4
4 011000101 4
5 001100100 3
6 110011111 7
7 011100100 4
